description: Pluggable idea-generation slot for prompt-driven research and ideation strategies.

fields.name: promptSource
fields.description: Relative path to the Markdown prompt source that drives this idea-generation mode.

fields.name: researchMode
fields.description: How aggressively the agent should browse and validate ideas.

fields.name: noveltyBar
fields.description: How strict the agent should be about avoiding obvious or crowded ideas.

fields.name: outputMode
fields.description: The expected output shape, such as shortlist, ranked list, or full concept briefs.

fields.name: sourceTypes
fields.description: Preferred source categories for validating or refining ideas.

fields.name: scoringAxes
fields.description: Criteria used to score or rank candidate ideas.
